sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
targets = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'w':
        b = n['boundary']
        row = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        col = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        targets.append((row, col))
print("Remaining white bars:", len(targets))
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in targets])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
